description_long: This nightstand features a classic, vintage-inspired design with a dark wood top and a beige painted body. The front showcases a single drawer with a curved handle and a lower cabinet door adorned with ornate trim and a decorative keyhole, suggesting a lockable compartment. The sides are plain, with the left side displaying a visible key inserted into the lock. The back panel is constructed from a lighter, natural wood, contrasting with the painted surfaces. The legs are elegantly curved, adding to the antique aesthetic, and subtle carved embellishments are present along the lower front edge. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a combination of solid wood and painted finishes.
description: A vintage-style nightstand with a dark wood top, beige painted body, ornate trim, and curved legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the drawer with a curved handle, ornate cabinet door, decorative trim, and curved legs.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain panel and a key inserted into the cabinet lock.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain, natural wood back panel with no handles or decorative features.
description_view_3: Right side view with a plain panel and a small portion of the key visible near the cabinet door.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
